title: [kimi-review] 7bb6ad2: [SEVERITY: medium] The provided diff contains no code change
description:

Message: fix(link): include LLSec byte in signable data

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] The provided diff contains no code changes — only commit metadata (hash, author, date, message). Either the commit is empty or the actual patch was omitted. Without seeing the modified lines, it's impossible to verify that the LLSec byte is correctly included in the signable data, or to check for bugs (e.g., off-by-one in buffer offsets, byte ordering, sign/verify asymmetry between signer and verifier code paths).
